name: @cw/desktop
description: CognitiveWorkflow Electron desktop shell (main + preload + renderer)

scripts.build: pnpm run build:ts && pnpm run build:renderer
scripts.test: pnpm run build && node --test dist/main/electron-app.test.js dist/main/electron-runtime-startup-options.test.js dist/main/runtime.test.js dist/main/runtime-command.test.js dist/main/runtime-connection-registry.test.js dist/main/runtime-handoff.test.js dist/main/runtime-ipc-handlers.test.js dist/main/runtime-ipc-main-factory.test.js dist/main/runtime-lifecycle.test.js dist/main/runtime-lock.test.js dist/main/runtime-orchestration.test.js dist/main/runtime-sidecar-stream-smoke.test.js dist/main/runtime-startup-controller.test.js dist/main/security.test.js dist/main/sidecar.test.js dist/preload/contract.test.js dist/renderer/runtime-stream-fetch-event-source.test.js dist/renderer/runtime-workbench-shell-react.test.js dist/shared/runtime-ipc.test.js scripts/runtime-workbench-visual-smoke.test.cjs scripts/runtime-workbench-visual-smoke-matrix.test.cjs scripts/m1-5-readiness-ledger.test.cjs scripts/m1-5-dependency-gate-proposal.test.cjs scripts/m1-5-ux-acceptance-checklist.test.cjs scripts/m1-5-fr-evidence-map.test.cjs scripts/m1-5-ux-gap-repair-plan.test.cjs scripts/m1-5-a4-evidence-manifest.test.cjs scripts/m1-5-a4-capture-execution.test.cjs scripts/m1-5-a4-runtime-flow-review-package.test.cjs scripts/m1-5-a4-runtime-flow-decision-handoff.test.cjs scripts/m1-5-a4-runtime-flow-decision-record.test.cjs scripts/m1-5-a4-needs-followup-repair-plan.test.cjs scripts/m1-5-a4-stream-phase-capture-execution.test.cjs scripts/m1-5-a4-runtime-bridge-user-path-capture.test.cjs scripts/m1-5-a8-git-history-prerequisite-evidence.test.cjs scripts/m1-5-local-ui-evidence-bundle.test.cjs scripts/m1-5-runtime-flow-repair-plan.test.cjs scripts/m1-5-runtime-flow-contract-acceptance-gate.test.cjs scripts/m1-5-fr015-snapshot-restore-contract-gate.test.cjs scripts/m1-5-desktop-runtime-bridge-plan.test.cjs scripts/m1-5-reference-management-repair-plan.test.cjs
